hero.tagline: I paint, photograph, write, and build things. This is what happens when curiosity meets craft and code.

newsletterCta.label: Newsletter
newsletterCta.headline: Stay curious.
newsletterCta.desc: Thoughts on art, life, and building things — delivered to your inbox.

aboutPage.bioP1: I'm a creator, a programmer, and a thinker. I love building things from scratch — whether it's a painting, a piece of code, or a deep-dive essay.
aboutPage.bioP2: For the longest time, the biggest obstacle to this passion was my own brain: I have ADHD. After trying nearly every productivity tool on the market, I realized they were all designed for a neurotypical mind. I needed a "partner" — something that understood me and could give me a gentle nudge right when I needed it most.
aboutPage.bioP3: I couldn't find it anywhere. So I decided to build it myself — for me, and for the millions of others with a "busy brain" just like mine. That's how Dopamind was born.
aboutPage.artworksText: I post my artworks at philoart.io/philo
aboutPage.artworksContactText: To purchase original paintings or photography prints, DM on X or email philo.li.official@gmail.com

ebookTranslator.title: Bilingual Ebook Translator
ebookTranslator.subtitle: Upload an EPUB, bring your own LLM API key, and get back a bilingual edition with the original and translated text interleaved paragraph by paragraph. The file is parsed entirely in your browser — your book never touches any server.

settings.apiKeyHint: Get one at {link}. Your key is sent only to {provider}, never to philoli.com.
settings.rememberKey: Remember key in this browser only (localStorage). Uncheck for shared devices.
settings.customEndpointHint: Full URL to an OpenAI-compatible /chat/completions endpoint.
settings.needApiKey: Enter an API key to continue.

upload.dropSubtitle: or click to choose a file
upload.noChapters: No readable chapters found in this EPUB.
